heading: Consent of State to conveyance in fee
label: 715f Consent of State to conveyance in fee
text: No deed or instrument of conveyance in fee shall be accepted by the Secretary of the Interior under this subchapter unless the State in which the area lies shall have consented by law to the acquisition by the United States of lands in that State.
notes: Transfer of FunctionsTransfer of functions of Secretary of Agriculture to Secretary of the Interior by Reorg. Plan No. II of 1939, see Transfer of Functions note set out under .section 715a of this title
